name: Crib Bedding Set - Two by Two Animals - 4pc - Cloud Island™
description:
This 4-Piece Crib Bedding Set from cloud Island™ is suitable for standard cribs and toddler beds. This bedding set includes two crib sheets with gray stripes on a white background on one and a solid gray finish on the other. Also included are a channel-stitched quilt with gray two-by-two animal prints on a white background and a white crib bedskirt with a 14-inch drop length. All pieces are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for added convenience.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
